headline: If You Invested $1,000 In Tesla Stock When Elon Musk Was Sued By The SEC In 2018, Here's How Much You'd Have Right Now.
summary: Investors who placed their hard-earned cash into major U.S. indices have enjoyed respectable returns since fall 2018. The S&P 500, Nasdaq-100 and Dow Jones Industrial Average have returned 40.82%, 72.74% and 25.80% respectively.

headline: Apple Stock Presents Opportunity For 25% Upside, Says Analyst: 'Golden Installed Base ... Linchpin To Our Bullish Thesis In A Shaky Macro'

summary: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) reported first-quarter deliveries that were slightly ahead of the Street's estimates.

headline: Tesla To Report Its Q1 2023 Financial Results On Wednesday, April 19, 2023

summary: Hype around Tesla, Inc.'s (NASDAQ: TSLA) Cybertruck has been gaining steam, as the vehicle's potential launch fast approaches.

headline: Apple Fans! Mark Your Calendar For June 5 As The Company Preps For The 'Beginning Of A Post-iPhone Era'
summary: Apple, Inc.’s (NASDAQ: AAPL) next biggest product after the iPhone is set to drop, with the unveil touted as a “monumental launch” for the company.
